Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: CTCM Advanced Lane Departure Warning coded.r
CTCM Steering Wheel Heating in valid range.r
CTCMMFSW Steering Wheel vibration test successful executed.r
Switch high beam- lighting horn activation

Item.Text: Error direction indicator right channel 1, Error direction indicator left channel 1
Error direction indicator right channel 1, Error direction indicator left channel 2
Error direction indicator left channel 1, direction indicator left activated
Error direction indicator right channel 2, Error direction indicator left channel 1
Error direction indicator right channel 2, Error direction indicator left channel 2
Error direction indicator right channel 2, direction indicator left activated
Direction indicator right activated, Error Direction indicator left channel 1
Direction indicator right activated, Error Direction indicator left channel 2
Direction indicator right activated, Direction indicator left activated

Data.Name: Steering wheel button 06 phone call acceptance
Steering wheel button 07 phone call end
Steering wheel button for the fanfare
Steering wheel Steering wheel activation buttons
Button rear wiper Intervall and Wash
Steering wheel button 06 phone call acceptance.2
Steering wheel button 07 phone call end.2
Button Shift By Wire Neutral high in direction R_
Button Shift By Wire Neutral low in direction D_

Item.Text: The ECU is operating as Gateway

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

DataItem.Name: CTCM Advanced Lane Departure Warning coded.r
CTCM Steering Wheel Heating in valid range.r
CTCMMFSW Steering Wheel vibration test successful executed.r
Switch high beam- lighting horn activation
Steering wheel button 06 phone call acceptance
Steering wheel button 07 phone call end
Steering wheel button for the fanfare
Steering wheel Steering wheel activation buttons
Button rear wiper Intervall and Wash
Steering wheel button 06 phone call acceptance.2
Steering wheel button 07 phone call end.2
Button Shift By Wire Neutral high in direction R_
Button Shift By Wire Neutral low in direction D_

Test.Description: The switch ''Cruise control'' has a malfunction.
The DIRECT SELECT lever has a malfunction.
Steering wheel shift button ''PLUS'' (+) has a malfunction.
Steering wheel shift button ''MINUS'' (-) has a malfunction.
The steering angle speed of the steering angle sensor is outside the valid range.
The steering wheel turn counter has a malfunction.
There is an internal fault in the steering angle sensor.
The steering wheel heater has a malfunction.
Button ''Steering wheel heater has a malfunction."
The left multifunction steering wheel button group has a malfunction.
The right multifunction steering wheel button group has a malfunction.
Switch Turn signal" has a malfunction."
Switch Steering column adjustment" has a malfunction."
Lane Keeping Assist has a malfunction.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction.
The power supply in the system is too low.
The power supply in the system is too high.
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high.
The steering column module has a malfunction.
Switch Windshield wiper" has a malfunction."
Button Wipe and wash" has a malfunction."
The switch ''Rear window wiper'' has a malfunction.
The switch ''High beams'' has a malfunction.
Button ''Fanfare horns has a malfunction."
Communication with the front signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction.
Communication with the rear signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction.
Communication with the central gateway has a malfunction.
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction.
LIN bus 1 has a malfunction.
Chassis CAN communication has a malfunction.
Communication with the intelligent servo module (ISM) has a malfunction.
Communication with control unit ''Multifunction camera'' has a malfunction.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''Multifunction camera''.
